summary: CashOutAI Testing - All requested features verified working. Stock API using FMP stable endpoint returns real prices. Chat shows 4+ weeks of history with daily date separators (Today/Yesterday/Full date). Timestamps display correctly in Eastern Time. Profile tab has Twitter/X style layout with banner, avatar, followers/following stats, achievements, and account details.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from original issue are working correctly. Stock API returns real AAPL/TSLA prices via FMP stable endpoint. Messages API supports 500 limit with aggregation pipeline. Chat timestamps use parseUTC helper with 'Z' suffix for correct timezone. Profile tab has Twitter/X style layout with all expected elements.

stock_price_api.details: GET /api/stock/AAPL and /api/stock/TSLA return real price data with 'price', 'formatted_price', 'change' fields

messages_api.details: GET /api/messages?limit=500 uses MongoDB aggregation with allowDiskUse, returns messages successfully

chat_timestamps.details: Timestamps display in Eastern Time correctly (parseUTC helper adds 'Z' suffix to UTC timestamps)

profile_tab_twitter_style.details: Profile shows banner, avatar with level badge, name/@username, followers/following stats, achievements, account details

edit_profile_button.details: Opens ProfileCustomization component with banner, avatar, bio, location options
